falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 low would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, as that prior bottom held at 4,811; this would signal the structure has broken down into a lower-low regime rather than a successful retest

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX peaking at 38.5 then rapidly subsiding; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic is escalating rather than resolving, contradicting the bottoming pattern where fear should be exhausting itself

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield falls below 3.80% and holds there for 3+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Given the blowoff score of 41 suggests elevated but not extreme positioning, a flight-to-quality bid driving yields sub-3.80% would indicate systemic risk-off contagion beyond the current correction scope, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal by forcing a defensive repositioning

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
